title: rubus pinnivagus
intro: Rubus pinnivagus, also known as the Japanese wild raspberry, is a type of bramble shrub native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus pinnivagus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, while also providing potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Rubus pinnivagus typically involve drying the leaves and fruits, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
